<li class="nav-item dropdown">
    <a class="nav-link main-nav-link waves-effect waves-dark waves-ripple text-uppercase" href="javascript:void(0)" id="navbarDropdownS" role="button" data-toggle="dropdown" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false">
        Solution
        <h5 class="subtext text-uppercase m-0">Provide Solution</h5>
    </a>
    <div class="dropdown-menu" aria-labelledby="navbarDropdownS">
        <div class="container custom-ribbon menuFilter-hs">
            <div class='col-xl-10 col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 m-auto p-0'>
                <ul class="navbar-nav row " >
                    <li data-ng-repeat="mlsf in mlSolutionFilter" class="nav-item col-xl-3 col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 filter-button {{mlsf.class}}" data-ng-click="filterClick(mlsf.class)" >
                        <a href="javascript:void(0)" class="nav-link rib-content text-uppercase card waves-effect waves-light waves-ripple">
                            <i class="{{mlsf.icon}}"></i>                                                        
                            <span class="pull-right m-0">{{mlsf.menuName}}</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>                                   
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>                        
        <!--<div class="container"><hr></div>-->
        <div class="container mega-dropdown m-b-10 sub-menu-hs">                            
            <div class='col-xl-12 col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 m-auto'>
                <ul class="navbar-nav row ">
                    <li data-ng-repeat="mlslm in mlSolutionMenus" class="nav-item col-sm filter {{mlslm.solutionFilter}} sub-filter {{mlslm.class}}" data-ng-click="subfilterClick(mlslm.class)">
                        <a href="javascript:void(0)" class="nav-link text-uppercase">
                            <i class="{{mlslm.icon}}"></i>
                            {{mlslm.menuName}}
                            <span>{{mlslm.subtitle}}</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>                                   
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
        <!--Sub sub menu filter-->
        <div class="container mega-dropdown m-b-10 sub-sub-menu-hs">                            
            <div class='col-xl-12 col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 m-auto'>
                <ul class="navbar-nav row ">
                    <li data-ng-repeat="mlsssm in mlSolutionSubMenus " class="nav-item col-sm subfilter {{mlsssm.subMenusFilter}}">
                        <a href="{{mlsssm.href}}" class="nav-link text-uppercase">
                            <i class="{{mlsssm.icon}}"></i>
                            {{mlsssm.menuName}}
                            <span>{{mlsssm.subtitle}}</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>                                  
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</li>
